weDo.system_description: The TEAM support system is designed to evaluate and reward contributions when someone shares knowledge or information with others, recording these contributions as points in a history. This system aims to improve interpersonal relationships.

about.title: ABOUT
about.description: Contrary to popular belief, Lorem Ipsum is not simply random text. It has roots in a piece of classical Latin literature from 45 BC, making it over 2000 years old. Richard McClintock, a Latin professor at Hampden-Sydney College in Virginia, looked up one of the more obscure Latin words.
